text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash needs to build experience, but not by
constantly running scrimmages. No, what she
needs is to compete with a Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After coming to this conclusion, I seek Symboli
Rudolf for help. She suggests I ask Mr. C.B., a
Triple Crown champion, for partner running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mr. C.B. readily agrees and defeats Eishin Flash
almost effortlessly. The race gives her firsthand
experience of what it takes to win the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Specifically, it's "the desire to win," and though
she questions Mr. C.B.'s abstract advice, Eishin
Flash seems to have learned something from it.
